hero.title: Two Hearts, One Journey
hero.subtitle: Join us for our special day

locations.name: Wedding Reception
locations.address: Krishna balaji Convention, Chakalipalem, Konaseema District, Andhra Pradesh

events.title: Pellichupulu
events.description: Two souls, one destined moment — when we first saw each other in the cherished tradition of Pelli Chupulu, hearts whispered what words couldn't say, planting the seed of a beautiful love story meant to last a lifetime.

events.title: Engagement
events.description: From a shy exchange of glances to a beautiful promise of forever, our engagement is the magical milestone where we exchange rings and intertwine our dreams, sealing our commitment surrounded by the joy and blessings of our beloved family and friends.

events.title: Wedding Ceremony
events.description: The beautiful culmination of our journey arrives as we tie the sacred knot, blending two families, countless smiles, and a million hopes into a perfect symphony of love, ready to walk hand-in-hand into a lifetime of endless togetherness.

presence.title: Under the verdant canopy.. amidst the fragrance of mango leaves.. To the soulful rhythm of Nadaswaram.. and the sacred vows of three knots.. As our children unite in the presence of Vedic hymns. We cordially seek your presence and blessings to grace this ceremony.
